diagnostics_source_of_truth: frontend runner summary JSON is authoritative for compile status, blocking stage, and aggregate diagnostic severity
emitted diagnostics JSON is authoritative for per-diagnostic line, column, severity, code, and message fields
symbol_resolution_source_of_truth: emitted manifest declaration records are authoritative for globals, functions, interfaces, implementations, protocols, and categories
manifest-published declaration line and column coordinates are authoritative over text-only scans
formatting_policy: formatter output must be generated through the canonical developer-tooling surface after a real compile attempt
formatter claims must fail closed outside the supported canonical subset
formatter output must never override compile-owned diagnostics or declaration coordinates
claim_narrowing_constraints: no editor-only shadow parser may become the source of truth for diagnostics or symbol resolution
formatting support must be described as preview or fail-closed until a replayable formatter output surface exists
symbol navigation claims must stay limited to compile-owned declarations and artifact-backed locations
